blockingIssues.description: Sync status filter dropdown is not wired to backend data fetch. The syncStatusFilter state in KasListPage, BankListPage, and GudangListPage is never passed to get*WithPagination, never included in useCallback dependencies, and never triggers a page reset, making the filter non-functional.
Claimed test file for SyncStatusBadge does not exist in the commit. Handoff lists 5 test cases added, but git diff shows zero test files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when component-level tests and agent-browser manual verification are required vs. optional. Workers repeatedly skip both for simple presentational UI changes (toasts, banners, badges), causing claimed tests to be missing and no interactive verification evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F011-UI (zero tests, zero agent-browser checks), F013-UI (zero tests, zero agent-browser checks), F015-UI (zero agent-browser checks), F016-UI (zero tests). Handoffs justify skipping with 'relies on existing infrastructure' or 'no new tests needed'.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'Verify Existing Implementation' procedure step for tasks where the required code already exists from prior milestones. Current skill assumes all tasks require net-new implementation and TDD, which does not fit verification-only features like F017-BE.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F017-BE commit contained no new source code because ConflictResolutionDialog integration was already implemented. The worker treated it as verification, which was correct, but the skill provides no guidance for this scenario.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the pattern for adding Tailwind keyframe animations when UI motion is needed, so workers don't extend tailwind.config.js inconsistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F013-UI added slide-in-right/slide-out-right keyframes to tailwind.config.js. AGENTS.md UI section only says 'Use TailwindCSS for styling' with no animation guidance.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that the codebase has two parallel database paths: localDatabaseManager.ts (schema-first, pooled) and legacy module databases (kasDatabase.ts, bankDatabase.ts, gudangDatabase.ts) which manage their own sql.js instances. Also document the pre-existing sync_status enum inconsistency: localDatabaseManager uses 'error' while module databases use 'failed'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: F012-BE observation: sync columns were added to legacy module databases rather than localDatabaseManager because renderer IPC depends on them. Pre-existing inconsistency noted between localDatabaseManager CHECK constraint ('error') and kasDatabase CHECK constraint ('failed').

rejectedObservations.observation: backend-worker skill should acknowledge that shallow unit tests are acceptable when module-private sql.js DB patterns make deep testing difficult
